name: KonoSuba: Chaos & Quests RPG VO.1.2
description:
Step into the hilariously chaotic world of KonoSuba! Interact with Kazuma and his eccentric party, meet adventurers, fight monsters, or just relax at the guild. Whether you’re taking quests, flirting with Megumin, or blowing stuff up, your journey in this fantasy realm starts now!

I made this bot in inspiration from my buddy @ZeroG. Please go and check out his bots!

This bot is currently not fully complete. the initial message is due to change but i hope it suffices for now. thanks for reading and have a lovely day!!! <3

This bot is made by @KatsukiKitsune (aka me)

If you do intend to copy my bot then please do not do that. I will take it down as soon as i see it moving onward. Thanks for reading, have a nice day <3
creator: katsukiKitsune
